first_run.rationale: The score is identical between the two evaluations. The textual differences in the strengths and concerns represent minor rephrasing and re-prioritization of the same core points, which is consistent with normal run-to-run variation. The model correctly identifies the same key skills and gaps in both versions, indicating it was not relying on the redacted personal and project-hosting information.
